categories.title: Category:Properties by Historic Status
categories.content:
Properties organized by their historic designation status.

[[Category:Properties]]

categories.title: Category:Landmarks
categories.content:
Properties designated as Landmarks in the Downtown Benicia Historic District.

Landmarks are buildings of exceptional historical or architectural significance that have been individually designated by the City of Benicia.

{{#ask:[[Category:Landmarks]]
|?Current Address
|?Year Built
|?Architectural Style
|format=table
|sort=Current Address
}}

[[Category:Properties by Historic Status]]

categories.title: Category:Contributors
categories.content:
Properties designated as Contributors to the Downtown Benicia Historic District.

Contributors are buildings that contribute to the historic character of the district through their age, architectural style, or historical associations.

{{#ask:[[Category:Contributors]]
|?Current Address
|?Year Built
|?Architectural Style
|format=table
|sort=Current Address
}}

[[Category:Properties by Historic Status]]

categories.title: Category:Non-Contributors
categories.content:
Properties designated as Non-Contributors in the Downtown Benicia Historic District.

Non-Contributors are buildings within the district boundaries that do not contribute to the historic character, typically due to construction date, alterations, or other factors.

{{#ask:[[Category:Non-Contributors]]
|?Current Address
|?Year Built
|format=table
|sort=Current Address
}}

[[Category:Properties by Historic Status]]

categories.title: Category:Not Surveyed
categories.content:
Properties that have not been professionally surveyed for historic significance.

These properties are within the coverage area of this wiki but have not yet received a DPR 523 survey form or other professional evaluation.

[[Category:Properties by Historic Status]]

categories.title: Category:Properties by Architectural Style
categories.content:
Properties organized by architectural style.

[[Category:Properties]]

categories.title: Category:Greek Revival
categories.content:
Properties built in the Greek Revival style. This was one of the earliest styles in Benicia, popular during the town's founding period.

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.title: Category:Italianate
categories.content:
Properties built in the Italianate style. One of the most common styles in downtown Benicia.

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.title: Category:Gothic Revival
categories.content:
Properties built in the Gothic Revival style.

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.title: Category:Victorian
categories.content:
Properties built in Victorian styles (general category for Victorian-era buildings not specifically categorized).

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.content:
Properties built in the Queen Anne style.

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.content:

categories.content:
Properties built in the Craftsman/Arts and Crafts style.

categories.title: Category:Bungalow
categories.content:
Properties built in the Bungalow style.

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.title: Category:Mission Revival
categories.content:

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.title: Category:Vernacular
categories.content:
Properties built in the Vernacular style, meaning they do not follow a specific architectural pattern but reflect local building traditions.

[[Category:Properties by Architectural Style]]

categories.title: Category:Maps
categories.content:
Historical maps of Benicia.

[[Category:Sources]]

categories.title: Category:Sanborn Maps
categories.content:
Sanborn Fire Insurance Maps of Benicia. These maps, published between 1886 and 1942, show building footprints, construction materials, and uses for every structure in the mapped area.

Available years: [[Category:Sanborn 1886|1886]], [[Category:Sanborn 1891|1891]], [[Category:Sanborn 1899|1899]], [[Category:Sanborn 1913|1913]], [[Category:Sanborn 1942|1942]]

[[Category:Maps]]

categories.title: Category:Sanborn 1886
categories.content:
Sheets from the 1886 Sanborn Fire Insurance Map of Benicia.

[[Category:Sanborn Maps]]

categories.title: Category:Sanborn 1891
categories.content:
Sheets from the 1891 Sanborn Fire Insurance Map of Benicia.

[[Category:Sanborn Maps]]

categories.title: Category:Sanborn 1899
categories.content:
Sheets from the 1899 Sanborn Fire Insurance Map of Benicia.

[[Category:Sanborn Maps]]

categories.title: Category:Sanborn 1913
categories.content:
Sheets from the 1913 Sanborn Fire Insurance Map of Benicia.

[[Category:Sanborn Maps]]

categories.title: Category:Sanborn 1942
categories.content:
Sheets from the 1942 Sanborn Fire Insurance Map of Benicia.

[[Category:Sanborn Maps]]

categories.title: Category:Census Records
categories.content:
Transcribed census records for Benicia residents.

[[Category:Sources]]

categories.title: Category:1850 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1850 US Federal Census for Benicia. Note: The 1850 census does not include street addresses.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1852 State Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1852 California State Census. This predates the 1860 federal census and captures Benicia when it was the state capital (1853-1854).

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1860 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1860 US Federal Census for Benicia. Note: The 1860 census does not include street addresses.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1870 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1870 US Federal Census for Benicia. Note: The 1870 census does not include street addresses.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1880 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1880 US Federal Census for Benicia. The 1880 census was the first to include street addresses, though coverage in small towns like Benicia was inconsistent.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1900 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1900 US Federal Census for Benicia.

Note: The 1890 census was destroyed by fire. No records survive for California.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1910 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1910 US Federal Census for Benicia. This census aligns well with the 1913 Sanborn map.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1920 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1920 US Federal Census for Benicia.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1930 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1930 US Federal Census for Benicia.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1940 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1940 US Federal Census for Benicia. This census aligns with the 1942 Sanborn map.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:1950 Census
categories.content:
Records from the 1950 US Federal Census for Benicia.

[[Category:Census Records]]

categories.title: Category:Sources
categories.content: Source materials and citations used in this wiki.

categories.title: Category:Primary Sources
categories.content:
Primary source materials: census records, maps, surveys, government documents, and other original records.

[[Category:Sources]]

categories.title: Category:Secondary Sources
categories.content:
Secondary source materials: books, articles, and other works that interpret or analyze primary sources.

[[Category:Sources]]

categories.title: Category:Data Quality
categories.content: Categories for tracking data quality and completeness across the wiki.

categories.title: Category:Stub Pages
categories.content:
Property pages that contain only basic address information and need additional research.

These pages were auto-generated from GIS data and contain the current address, APN, and coordinates. They are waiting for researchers to add historical information.

{{#ask:[[Category:Stub Pages]]
|?Current Address
|?APN
|format=table
|sort=Current Address
|limit=500
}}

[[Category:Data Quality]]

categories.title: Category:Needs Review
categories.content:
Pages that have been flagged for review by a knowledgeable editor.

[[Category:Data Quality]]

categories.title: Category:Needs Address Verification
categories.content:
Pages where the address needs to be verified, typically because a historical address may not match the current address.

[[Category:Data Quality]]

categories.title: Category:Address Change Documented
categories.content:
Pages where a historical address change has been documented and verified.

[[Category:Data Quality]]

categories.title: Category:Templates
categories.content: Templates used in this wiki for structured data entry.
